preferredDeck: AI ranked friend suggestions and a shared friends lens across core views.
editorialGuidance: Keep the tone concise, professional, and specific.
Lead with user-facing outcomes, shipping milestones, trust wins, and installability improvements.
Demote internal cleanup unless it clearly changes the shipped product.
pinnedHighlights: Added ranked friend suggestions built from identity graph data, activity signals, contact overlap, and optional local AI content classifications.
Added the Friends and All content lens to the feed toolbar so the map, feed, and friends views share the same scope control.
Preserved paused native local AI downloads more reliably across pause and bookkeeping boundaries.
